name: obsidian-relative-line-numbers
description: Enables relative line numbers in editor mode

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.deploy: bun run build && mkdir -p "/Users/lhak/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/lhakZettel/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-relative-line-numbers" && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "/Users/lhak/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/lhakZettel/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-relative-line-numbers/"

author: Nadav Spiegelman
